/usr/bin/c++  -fno-operator-names -fno-exceptions -Wall -Wextra -Wcast-align -Wchar-subscripts -Wformat-security -Wno-long-long -Wpointer-arith -Wundef -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Woverloaded-virtual -Werror=return-type -Werror=init-self -Wvla -Wdate-time -Wsuggest-override -Wlogical-op -g -Wl,--enable-new-dtags  "CMakeFiles/lumencode-cli.dir/lumencode-cli_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/lumencode-cli.dir/src/lumencode-cli.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/lumencode-cli.dir/src/filesystemmodel.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/lumencode-cli.dir/src/projectcontroller.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/lumencode-cli.dir/src/symbolparser.cpp.o" -o bin/lumencode-cli  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libKF5CoreAddons.so.5.115.0 lib/libvendor-tree-sitter.a lib/libvendor-tree-sitter-javascript.a lib/libvendor-tree-sitter-typescript.a lib/libvendor-tree-sitter-tsx.a lib/libvendor-tree-sitter-php.a lib/libvendor-tree-sitter-css.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.13
